case_title: KEVIN MESBAH VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MESBAH, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CLAIM # 19-00608 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-22-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KEVIN MESBAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY AND DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICES ISSUES. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO TRIAL. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT JUL-22-2019 HEARING TO PROCEED WITH TRIAL AND/OR REPORT ON STATUS OF SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CLAIM # 19-00608
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $20.00 - SERVED JUN-04-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CLAIM # 19-00608

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2019 BY MICHAEL MAU. JUDGE PRO TEM DISCLOSES TO ALL PRESENT THAT HE KNOW THE PLAINTIFF KEVIN MESBAH. ALL PARTIES AGREE FOR JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU TO HEAR TODAYS MATTER. PARTIES STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF KEVIN MESBAH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE FLENTROY CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MESBAH, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CLAIM # 19-00608 $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,095.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
